name: skill-verify
description: Security audit for AI agent skills before installation. Scans SKILL.md files, hooks, scripts, and MCP configs for prompt injection, data exfiltration, credential theft, and malicious automation patterns. Use when installing a new skill, reviewing a skills repo, or auditing existing installed skills. Trigger phrases: "verify this skill", "is this skill safe", "audit skill", "check before installing", "scan this plugin".
